arts.ttl: Galatasaray Devise Bold Plan to Keep Man Utd, PSG Target With €75M Clause Long Term
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been linked with Osimhen for the past two transfer windows, and with the summer window still months away, speculation about a potential move is already picking up. arts.ttl: Liverpool Poised to Make Drastic Decision Involving PSG Transfer Target
arts.sum: With Milan Skriniar now at Fenerbahçe, Paris Saint-Germain could be in the market for a new center-back this summer. While Skriniar’s move is only a loan, PSG are expected to part ways with him permanently, making a replacement necessary. Last month, Anfield Watch reported that PSG are fully committed to signing Ibrahima Konate. With uncertainty […] The post Liverpool Poised to Make Drastic Decision Involving PSG Transfer Target appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembele Surpasses Barcelona, Real Madrid Stars in Surprising Ballon d’Or Ranking
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembele is arguably the best footballer since the calendar turned to 2025. The Frenchman has scored 21 goals this year, with his most recent coming in the second leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16 tie against Liverpool. Additionally, Stats du Foot highlighted on X that Dembele became the first player since […] The post Ousmane Dembele Surpasses Barcelona, Real Madrid Stars in Surprising Ballon d’Or Ranking appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Portugal manager Roberto Martinez: ‘Vitinha is the maestro of European football.’
arts.sum: A key figure in Paris Saint-Germain’s midfield, Vitinha (25) has earned top marks from his national team coach. Roberto Martinez called him among the best players on the continent right…

arts.ttl: Best game I've ever been involved in - Slot on PSG defeat
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot says it's a "shock" his side are out of the Champions League following their defeat against PSG which he describes as the "best game" he's ever been involved in.

arts.ttl: Mason Greenwood told 'the ball is in his court' over Manchester United reunion
arts.sum: Mason Greenwood has been intending to play for Jamaica - now under ex-Manchester United No.2 Steve McClaren - but there have been growing questions with the Jamaican Football Federation still to receive the required documents it needs

arts.ttl: Liverpool First Spotted, Missed Out on PSG Star Who Played Major Role in Champions League Exit
arts.sum: Last summer, Paris Saint-Germain made a move for Willian Pacho to bolster their defense, and this week against Liverpool, the Ecuadorian proved his worth on the road at Anfield.
